figures.caption: Figure 1: (a) Distribution of spectral efficiency. (b) Zero-shot generalization and no retraining needed. (c) Robustness to CSI errors as σ2 e due to slow-time scale updating. (d) Scalability. (e) Inference latency. (f) Mobility robustness degrades gracefully due to fast-fading decoupling.

Table II: Performance evaluation, sensitivity analysis, and ablation study. Ablation confirms quantum superposition (largest drop at −0.60 bps/Hz) and score history (worst convergence at +28 ep.) are the most critical components.
